title: User successfully logs in with valid email and password
preconditions: User is on the login page
User has a valid registered account: email 'john.doe@example.com', password 'SecureP@ss2023'

steps.action: Navigate to the login page
steps.expected_result: Login page loads successfully with email and password input fields visible and a disabled Login button.

steps.action: Enter a valid registered email address into the 'Email' field
steps.expected_result: The 'Email' field is populated with the entered email address.

steps.action: Enter the corresponding valid password into the 'Password' field
steps.expected_result: The 'Password' field is populated with masked characters, and the Login button becomes enabled.

steps.action: Click the 'Login' button
steps.expected_result: User is successfully redirected to the application's dashboard or home page, and a 'Welcome, John!' or similar success message is displayed.

steps.action: Verify user session status
steps.expected_result: User's profile icon/name is visible, and a 'Logout' option is available, indicating an active session.

title: User logs in, session persists across internal navigation
preconditions: User is on the login page
User has a valid registered account: email 'jane.smith@test.com', password 'MyP@ssw0rd!'

steps.action: Navigate to the login page
steps.expected_result: Login page loads successfully with email and password input fields visible.

steps.action: Enter valid email address in the 'Email' field
steps.expected_result: The 'Email' field is populated.

steps.action: Enter valid password in the 'Password' field
steps.expected_result: The 'Password' field is populated, and the Login button is enabled.

steps.action: Click the 'Login' button
steps.expected_result: User is redirected to the dashboard/home page.

steps.action: Navigate to an internal page within the application (e.g., 'Settings')
steps.expected_result: The internal page loads successfully, and the user is still logged in, indicated by persistent UI elements (e.g., profile icon, name, logout option).

title: Login fails with valid email and incorrect password
preconditions: User is on the login page
User has a valid registered account: email 'john.doe@example.com'

steps.action: Navigate to the login page
steps.expected_result: Login page loads successfully.

steps.action: Enter a valid registered email address into the 'Email' field
steps.expected_result: The 'Email' field is populated.

steps.action: Enter an incorrect password into the 'Password' field
steps.expected_result: The 'Password' field is populated with masked characters, and the Login button is enabled.

steps.action: Click the 'Login' button
steps.expected_result: An error message 'Invalid email or password.' or similar appears on the page. User remains on the login page.

steps.action: Verify no redirection occurs
steps.expected_result: The URL remains '/login' and the user is not logged in.

title: Login fails with unregistered email address
preconditions: User is on the login page
Email 'unregistered@test.org' is confirmed NOT to be registered in the system.

steps.action: Navigate to the login page
steps.expected_result: Login page loads successfully.

steps.action: Enter an unregistered email address into the 'Email' field
steps.expected_result: The 'Email' field is populated.

steps.action: Enter an arbitrary password into the 'Password' field
steps.expected_result: The 'Password' field is populated with masked characters, and the Login button is enabled.

steps.action: Click the 'Login' button
steps.expected_result: An error message 'Invalid email or password.' or similar appears on the page. User remains on the login page.

steps.action: Verify no redirection occurs
steps.expected_result: The URL remains '/login' and the user is not logged in.

title: Login fails to initiate when email field is empty
preconditions: User is on the login page

steps.action: Navigate to the login page
steps.expected_result: Login page loads successfully with both fields empty and the Login button disabled.

steps.action: Leave the 'Email' field empty
steps.expected_result: The 'Email' field remains empty.

steps.action: Enter a valid password into the 'Password' field
steps.expected_result: The 'Password' field is populated with masked characters.

steps.action: Verify the state of the 'Login' button
steps.expected_result: The 'Login' button remains disabled, preventing form submission.

steps.action: Attempt to click the disabled 'Login' button (if UI allows)
steps.expected_result: No action occurs; the button remains disabled, and no login attempt is initiated. No error message related to login processing appears.

title: Successful login with maximum length valid email and password
preconditions: User is on the login page
A registered account exists with maximum allowed length email (e.g., 254 characters) and password (e.g., 64 characters).

steps.action: Navigate to the login page
steps.expected_result: Login page loads successfully.

steps.action: Enter the maximum valid length email address into the 'Email' field
steps.expected_result: The 'Email' field accepts and displays the full long email address without truncation or errors.

steps.action: Enter the maximum valid length password into the 'Password' field
steps.expected_result: The 'Password' field accepts and displays masked characters for the full long password, and the Login button is enabled.

steps.action: Click the 'Login' button
steps.expected_result: User is successfully redirected to the dashboard/home page, confirming successful login with boundary-length credentials.

title: Login button disabled/enabled state correctly reflects field input status
preconditions: User is on the login page
Both email and password fields are initially empty.

steps.action: Navigate to the login page
steps.expected_result: Login page loads successfully with both 'Email' and 'Password' fields empty, and the 'Login' button is visibly disabled.

steps.action: Enter a valid email address into the 'Email' field, leave 'Password' empty
steps.expected_result: The 'Email' field is populated, but the 'Login' button remains disabled.

steps.action: Clear the 'Email' field, enter a valid password into the 'Password' field
steps.expected_result: The 'Password' field is populated, but the 'Login' button remains disabled.

steps.action: Enter a valid email address into the 'Email' field (both fields now filled)
steps.expected_result: Both 'Email' and 'Password' fields are populated, and the 'Login' button becomes enabled.

steps.action: Clear either the 'Email' or 'Password' field
steps.expected_result: The 'Login' button becomes disabled again.

title: Attempt SQL Injection via email field
preconditions: User is on the login page

steps.action: Navigate to the login page
steps.expected_result: Login page loads successfully.

steps.action: Enter a SQL Injection payload into the 'Email' field
steps.expected_result: The 'Email' field accepts the input.

steps.action: Enter an arbitrary password into the 'Password' field
steps.expected_result: The 'Password' field is populated, and the Login button is enabled.

steps.action: Click the 'Login' button
steps.expected_result: User is NOT logged in. An appropriate error message 'Invalid email or password.' or 'Invalid input format.' is displayed. No unexpected database errors or internal server errors are exposed on the UI or in developer console logs.

steps.action: Verify user remains on the login page
steps.expected_result: The URL remains '/login', and the user is not redirected to a logged-in state.

title: Attempt Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) via email field
preconditions: User is on the login page

steps.action: Navigate to the login page
steps.expected_result: Login page loads successfully.

steps.action: Enter an XSS payload into the 'Email' field
steps.expected_result: The 'Email' field accepts the input.

steps.action: Enter an arbitrary password into the 'Password' field
steps.expected_result: The 'Password' field is populated, and the Login button is enabled.

steps.action: Click the 'Login' button
steps.expected_result: User is NOT logged in. No alert box or script execution occurs in the browser. An appropriate error message 'Invalid email or password.' or 'Invalid input format.' is displayed.

steps.action: Inspect the page source and browser console for script execution or unescaped HTML
steps.expected_result: No script tags are found unescaped in the rendered HTML, and no console errors related to script execution from the input are observed. The user remains on the login page.
